m13913.title: Animal Crackers
m13913.tagline: The maddest comics of them all!
m13913.plot: The well-known explorer and hunter Captain Spaulding has just returned from Africa, and is being welcomed home with a lavish party at the estate of influential society matron Mrs.

m31995.plot: In early 19th-century Cornwall, young Mary Yellan travels to live with her aunt and uncle at the remote Jamaica Inn, where she discovers the inn is a front for a violent gang of wreckers who lure ships to their doom alon

m14588.plot: Nick and Nora Charles investigate when Nora's cousin reports her disreputable husband is missing, and find themselves in a mystery involving the shady owners of a popular nightclub, a singer and her dark brother, the cou

m26252.plot: Pépé le Moko, one of France's most wanted criminals, hides out in the Casbah section of Algiers.

m963.plot: A private detective takes on a case that involves him with three eccentric criminals, a beautiful liar, and their quest for a priceless statuette.

m303.title: Notorious (1946)
m303.tagline: Deep their love! Great the risk!
m303.plot: In order to help bring Nazis to justice, U.S.

m3090.plot: Two jobless Americans convince a prospector to travel to the mountains of Mexico with them in search of gold.

m910.plot: Private Investigator Philip Marlowe is hired by wealthy General Sternwood regarding a matter involving his youngest daughter Carmen.

m212.plot: Mortimer Brewster, a newspaper drama critic, playwright, and author known for his diatribes against marriage, suddenly falls in love and gets married;  but when he makes a quick trip home to tell his two maiden aunts, he

m981.plot: When a rich woman's ex-husband and a tabloid-type reporter turn up just before her planned remarriage, she begins to learn the truth about herself.

m28580.title: The Lost Weekend
m28580.tagline: The screen dares to open the strange and savage pages of a shocking bestseller!
m28580.plot: Longtime alcoholic Don Birnam has been sober for ten days and appears to be over the worst...

m3767.tagline: There NEVER was a woman like Gilda!
m3767.plot: A gambler discovers an old flame while in Argentina, but she's married to his new boss.

m678.plot: The peaceful life of a gas station owner is disrupted when a man from his past arrives in town and forces him to return to the dark world he had tried to escape.

m20246.title: The Stranger
m20246.tagline: The most deceitful man a woman ever loved!
m20246.plot: An investigator from the War Crimes Commission travels to Connecticut to find an infamous Nazi, who may be hiding out in a small town in the guise of a distinguished professor engaged to the Supreme Court Justice’s daugh

m11898.title: Kind Hearts and Coronets

m11898.plot: When his mother eloped with an Italian opera singer, Louis Mazzini was cut off from her aristocratic family.

m3089.title: Red River
m3089.plot: Following the Civil War, headstrong rancher Thomas Dunson decides to lead a perilous cattle drive from Texas to Missouri.

m11016.plot: A hurricane swells outside, but it's nothing compared to the storm within the hotel at Key Largo.

m22584.plot: A Martinique charter boat skipper gets mixed up with the underground French resistance operatives during WWII.

m13528.plot: A newlywed fears she's going mad when strange things start happening at the family mansion.

m15794.plot: A psychopathic criminal with a mother complex makes a daring break from prison and then leads his old gang in a chemical plant payroll heist.

m965.title: The Magnificent Ambersons
m965.tagline: Real life screened more daringly than it’s ever been before!
m965.plot: The spoiled young heir to the decaying Amberson fortune comes between his widowed mother and the man she has always loved.

m20530.title: Late Spring
m20530.plot: Noriko is perfectly happy living at home with her widowed father, Shukichi, and has no plans to marry -- that is, until her aunt Masa convinces Shukichi that unless he marries off his 27-year-old daughter soon, she will

m30588.title: Monsieur Verdoux
m30588.plot: The film is about an unemployed banker, Henri Verdoux, and his sociopathic methods of attaining income.

m28162.title: A Matter of Life and Death
m28162.tagline: Neither Heaven nor Earth could keep them apart!
m28162.plot: A British wartime aviator who cheats death must argue for his life before a celestial court, hoping to prolong his fledgling romance with an American girl.

m909.title: Meet Me in St. Louis
m909.plot: A year in the life of a turn-of-the-century middle class family, leading up to the opening of the 1904 St.

m2897.plot: Based on the famous book by Jules Verne the movie follows Phileas Fogg on his journey around the world.

m976.title: Sweet Smell of Success
m976.plot: New York City newspaper writer J.J.

m935.plot: After the insane General Jack D.

m907.plot: The life of a Russian physician and poet who, although married to another, falls in love with a political activist's wife and experiences hardship during World War I and then the October Revolution.

m4727.tagline: Beguiling BATHING BEAUTIES will give you a load of laughs!
m4727.plot: The ambitious police officer Cruchot is transferred to St.

m11281.plot: After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr.
